findings.title: PROP-072 PRIMARY observability FAILED on first post-deploy cycle: no sync-workspace-runs sentinel committed despite agent self-attestation of 'step4c ran'
findings.summary: Workspace-sync's 17:22 cycle is the FIRST post-PROP-072 cycle (PROP-072 deployed at 17:16:08Z). Its run-report agent_notes string includes 'step4c ran (SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE=4)'. However, no monitor/integrity/sync-workspace-runs-2026-05-31T17-22-*.json file exists in git after the cycle. Git log of commits 17:15Z to 17:53Z confirms NO new sync-workspace-runs-* file was added by any commit. The c9e1d92 commit labeled 'PROP-066 step4c sentinel: 2026-05-31T17:22:40Z' contains 13 OTHER workspace-owned files (analyst/curmudgeon/decisions/status) but NO sentinel file. Most recent sync-workspace-runs sentinel in repo remains 2026-05-31T09-07-58Z, unchanged from the 17:22 tinker baseline.
evidence_files: git show c9e1d92 (commit titled 'PROP-066 step4c sentinel' contains NO sentinel files)

hypothesis.h1_sentinel_count_unreliable_signal: Workspace-sync's clone is freshly created each cycle; in a fresh clone all pre-existing files have mtime=clone-time. SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE counts files with mtime > now-600s; this PASSES for the 3 historical files (sync-workspace-runs-2026-05-30T01-16-37Z.json, sync-workspace-runs-2026-05-31T09-07-58Z.json, sync-workspace-non-ff-abort-2026-05-28T21-07-45Z.json) just because they were touched at clone time. SENTINEL_COUNT=4 is consistent with 3 historical-but-clone-touched files + 0-or-1 fresh-step4c writes. The metric is NOT a reliable proof of step4c emitting a NEW sentinel.
hypothesis.h2_step4c_ran_but_writeFile_failed_silen: Possible if process.cwd() at node invocation wasn't the clone root (Step 4 collapsed block's bash inherits the cd from Step 1, but if the LLM split the bash session and lost the cd, node would run from a non-clone path and writeSentinel would write to /sessions/.../monitor/integrity/* — outside the clone — silently)
hypothesis.h3_step4c_did_not_run_and_self_attestati: Possible if the Haiku agent inferred-and-narrated step4c ran without actually invoking the helper. SECONDARY backstop would only catch this if the agent emits the literal 'step4c-not-invoked' string, which it did not.
hypothesis.most_likely: h2 OR a mixture of h1+h3. Empirical disambiguation requires inspecting workspace-sync's bash trace (not retained) or instrumenting the step4c.js script to write a more visible breadcrumb.

findings.recommendation: Defer PROP authoring one more cycle. Wait for the 18:00 workspace-sync cycle (next scheduled run). If THAT cycle also fails to commit a sync-workspace-runs sentinel while reporting 'step4c ran', author PROP-073 to: (a) replace SENTINEL_COUNT_THIS_CYCLE's mtime-based heuristic with a STRICT filename-timestamp check (only files whose embedded ISO timestamp is within last 10min count); (b) add a 'sentinel file basename committed' verification step that fails-loud if the git add of step4c sentinels doesn't actually stage anything; (c) instrument sync-workspace-step4c.js to log the absolute write path it used so a cwd-mismatch failure becomes visible in the run report.
findings.operator_action: None required this cycle. Carry-forward observability cycle is mechanical.
